description_long: This is a pink and white trucker-style cap with a structured front panel and a curved bill. The front panel is white and features colorful, graffiti-style embroidered text that reads 'EXPAND'. The bill and mesh back panels are a light pink color, with the mesh providing breathability and a casual look. The cap has a classic six-panel construction, with visible stitching along the seams and bill. The back of the hat is made of see-through mesh material, typical of trucker hats, and likely includes an adjustable snap closure, though it is not clearly visible. The overall design is playful and urban, making it suitable for casual streetwear.
description: A pink and white trucker cap with a curved bill, mesh back, and colorful 'EXPAND' embroidery on the front panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white panel with colorful 'EXPAND' embroidery and the pink curved bill.
description_view_1: Rear side view highlighting the pink mesh back and the transition from the white front panel.
description_view_2: Back view focusing on the pink mesh panels and the rounded crown, with the bill barely visible.
description_view_3: Angled front view showing both the embroidered front panel and the pink mesh side.
attribute_crown_shape: structured, rounded front panel with mesh back
